topic: ACL main page 3 Related Work sim-to linebreak polish

before_text_matches: page 3 line 001: Synthetic rendering shifts. Prior sim-to-               3.2   Evidence Gates
defect.reader_effect: The page opened with a visible compound split in the Related Work paragraph immediately before the Method/Evidence Gates transition.

changes.summary: Reworded Prior sim-to-real work to Prior transfer work.
Added a local hyphen-penalty group around the short paragraph to avoid new ordinary-word breaks in the narrow column.

rejected_iterations.summary: Prior simulation transfer work removed sim-to- but introduced simula-, Trem-, and pro-.
A short-sentence citation rewrite introduced ren-, Preview-, and as-.
A transfer-work-only rewrite introduced Ran-, trans-, and mod-.
A local sloppy group did not suppress the ordinary-word breaks.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 3 shows no alphabetic line-end hyphenation after the accepted rewrite.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The full after scan reports no body-text line-end hyphenation outside bibliography pages; pages 9-10 retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
after_evidence.visual_result: The page-3 Related Work paragraph opens without a split compound or new ordinary-word breaks, and the spacing remains acceptable in the rendered screenshot.

claim_boundary: Related Work prose and local linebreak behavior only. No metric values, evidence pools, figures, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Bibliography pages retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
